close_reason: Implemented mapper package that converts extraction results to Buck2 targets and applies changes to rules.star using the starlark object model.
description:
# Mapping Layer

Component that converts extracted imports to Buck2 target references.

## Responsibilities

1. Take extraction protocol output
2. Apply mapping rules (import path → Buck2 target)
3. Consider configured deps files (go-deps.toml, rust-deps.toml, etc.)
4. Output mutation commands for the object model

## Tasks

- [ ] Define mapping configuration format
- [ ] Implement import → target mapper for each language
- [ ] Handle internal vs external deps detection
- [ ] Integrate with existing *-deps.toml files
- [ ] Generate mutation commands from mapping output
title: Phase 4: Mapping Layer
